narrative:
Monclova Township has 12,007 registered voters, with 49.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 30.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 19.4%, a clear Republican lean of 11.4 percentage points.
